description: Available external connections/integrations and their supported object types

workfront.name: Adobe Workfront
workfront.description: Workfront objects — users, groups, teams, job roles, and companies. Most common connection for sharing and permission scenarios.

brand.name: Adobe Applications (Brands)
brand.description: GenStudio Brands objects — listed under Adobe Applications in the connection picker

usage.connectionName: Pass the connection key as-is (lowercase string, e.g. 'workfront')
usage.objectType: Pass the object type code as an uppercase string (e.g. 'PROJ')
usage.defaultConnection: Use 'workfront' for most sharing/permission scenarios in Workfront Planning
